title: Cobblemon Insurgence Addon
description: An addon for the Cobblemon mod which adds the Delta species alongside other Pokemon from the Pokemon Insurgence fangame.
body:
#  **The Cobblemon Insurgence Addon**

**Addon no longer independently updated. It is now part of the [Gravelmon](https://modrinth.com/datapack/gravelmon) addon!**

## **Overview**
Cobblemon Insurgence is an addon for the Cobblemon mod that aims to add all of the various forms presented by Pokemon Insurgence. Though Deltas are the clear highlight, other forms, such as the Armored forms or new Megas, will be included over time. 

## **Install Info**
Cobblemon Insurgence must be enabled as both a resourcepack for the client, and a datapack for the world in use, to function properly. 

**Caution:** Due to the change of Deltas being made into separate Pokemon rather than forms, updating from version 0.4.1 or earlier will require all present delta Pokemon be non-present. (This may include being loaded into your world, in your pc, or in your party itself)







## **Credits**
- Addon Contributors for models, animations, and all the necessary components to make this addon
- Cobblemon Team for the base models, textures, and animations for most of what's used
- Insurgence Team for creating a wonderful fangame that continues to invoke creativity even today

*We have received proper permission for the designs we add, and for the artists that have no methods of contact, we will remove the specified designs upon request.*
